title: juncus × diffusus
intro: Juncus × diffusus, also known as soft rush, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae, commonly found in wetlands and marshy areas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been shown to help soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Juncus × diffusus include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestive health. Soft rush can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various ailments.
